textByHash.00cfbe81ddb416f2cc729226f1280b77c097b975: It's okay, I'm not really going to eat your eyeballs. Spiders don't do that.
textByHash.056d68c47370dd24a2d48f1f585273b9b2ccf2c2: Hey, are you scared of spiders?
textByHash.07243ca9f7d55904b3c857410a29785b2c3e9d5a: You're right. They probably used the machine to give themselves really long running-away type legs. We'll never catch them now.
textByHash.16f8af8a6d176206829ca31947492744c6563cc2: Please don't fry me with your heat rays!
textByHash.18c29806a60d1b01dac8c4340a529997e0dc637e: Suppose I was bitten by a magically-irradiated man?
textByHash.1e562e6b1609f86bc18fe80bb2bcef8a88eab5c8: Hey...there are so many humans in your world.
textByHash.1f97b98e4a1f35512472d50b7ee3df3791f315fe: How's you get such long legs? Do you have some kind of leg-extending machine?
textByHash.2374c0f38a60a28046a4d6796bc6e453b3f0eca9: It's not dangerous! What's the worst that could happen?
textByHash.251b4f0ba0732505118c8d41f258ac81044dc489: Then again, your legs are much longer than mine.
textByHash.2584014160b5141b5363053d00ef619e98bdbe83: I'm going to learn how to fly! I'm going to be a flying spider!
textByHash.31b7c062ff843187984ac1f81f8a4d6d03807e80: You should just pretend I'm not a spider! Like, maybe I'm an eight-legged mouse!
textByHash.3b23542d88138bc250a215cb1bc2bdd5265825a8: You are a mighty hero, aren't you? I bet you've slain dragons and all sorts of stuff.
textByHash.4024a41db3e5506d6eafd29edb25246ac20be373: You just wait! Soon I'll have the best legs ever!
textByHash.66216e3d6c42c47094b42b30a1deed510cb9390a: I could be your sidekick! and Eek! We could have all sorts of adventures together!
textByHash.66ce8aa40b343f5e6ca24195d36431b80ca80efb: I've got to try not to be scary.
textByHash.6b9f9fa2658861cadf8f111f3da5730c55bb4c5e: Boo! Raaar! I'm a scary spider!
textByHash.7373d558e877a7c747c80f07a2478eef623f0a91: I think I know more about spiders than you, seeing how I am one!
textByHash.777f0cb2ab740517bbcbd7c3cd9eeb4b180b6f2b: Hey, you've only got four legs. How do you manage? Don't you fall over?
textByHash.77c4db3aeef84023077ab91064fce1e2599f30fa: Oh, wow! Even I was scared of me when I said that!
textByHash.7874f61bdc2ea6bf4d5315e862625ffba8a33032: I don't care. I'm not talking to you any more.
textByHash.78b94ffc4120f4db5bbd42df93fd3e9f17b1da85: Oh! I wouldn't want to use it if it's broken.
textByHash.79cd223ff51e1bf3059b1e9df12654cf5f21a041: That is so heroic...giving your legs away to someone without legs.
textByHash.7b8b103aae87fa3c51014a182e0dadfc6e501cb4: We've got to catch the leg thief!
textByHash.82290523bf8dc2dec88dd59a8d415cbf0f9e0b4c: Um...okay! I'll spin the webs...and then you throw me in the air.
textByHash.84ca9461e5fc280185e5149158fb8b4263066590: It might malfunction and give me tiny, tiny legs! Like a slug, only with tiny legs!
textByHash.92d5ed6c3d13b020b8cf8bfffc4d6c78195ffa9b: You would say that! You want to keep it for yourself!
textByHash.934014ca0287d8db00a32dc8dfd4c7092e43db33: Yay! and Eek! We'll travel all over the world fighting for justice! And freedom! And things like that!
textByHash.991d80f5c601634e718d468fe0d07e92c30cfa50: Someone has stolen your legs! This is a DISASTER!
textByHash.a433cfe8af8fc31466f4a3010441a929f519d354: Aww, don't say that. Everyone is special!
textByHash.a604c27518419471f878f35e4850b52d628848e7: I don't think I've got the webs right. I'm not ready yet. We'll do it another time.
textByHash.a6c7dc3badad6a47c22e590e55620d9425c3446e: Yes! I could have all sorts of gadgets! Like a gadget that spins webs!
textByHash.a837f138a0cc23c57b6aa6fd97ca29330aa30326: I'm going to spin webs between my legs to make wings! Then I can fly!
textByHash.a859851be4b3f86963c921a4fb58c1825af37cb4: Back in my old web there are only spiders.
textByHash.a9b7355dc5f0fbea97a6bc5432a47917191405e2: Walk on two legs! Yes! Then I could use my other six legs to FIGHT CRIME!
textByHash.b6fd43a8f9002aac00ef1e80bc7222461805900e: Some spiders can fly! They use web strands to float in the air!
textByHash.b82fb9cb70350417ceda1f1bec12d522f4de0f48: Well that's okay. Maybe I don't even need your leg-extending machine!
textByHash.bc4762e14fa4abee46bc5b8b538cb0313ed49dd5: I bet I can make you scared of spiders!
textByHash.be40b864f4f557a2fe1c602d8070f9946f8c4311: The worst that can happen is, like, the wings fail and I fall to my death.
textByHash.be716ae277e68684536b69b3486a2f8474a51fbd: Where is the leg-extending machine? I want to use it!
textByHash.c337ade56fcc7c822c847fe48218d34175252f40: I might become the Man-Spider! I'd gain all the powers of a man! Like um...
textByHash.c5f51ebd4a14be3e73a86e16847fff6cb825561d: Oh! I didn't know humans could do that!
textByHash.d264e58ffe9a16774a2aebb25966508824289066: Um...what can humans do that's special?
textByHash.d3a3c121e9408282d40cbbdeef63d2d70a21a353: You know best, though. You're so BRAVE putting yourself in danger all by yourself!
textByHash.d7baed3de0688c3b6ee29d13acf18b225eae7507: I bet you're a mighty hero!
textByHash.dcfe773ef0f10a7b37d9ec271840a7d942581182: Next time you go to sleep I'm going to crawl on your face and EAT YOUR EYEBALLS!
textByHash.e39fe2ee1fb9a533f8d774dd37bc7949b784864f: Come on! Let's have an adventure!
textByHash.e8bdd4b37c870cb2440c01c37a35ebc71c01e32b: I don't want to fly now. I'm not in the mood.
textByHash.e99556cabec0cac90985429d3611baa30ee8c0ac: Aww. I bet you'll be a mighty hero someday, though.
textByHash.f06f2d37a5d25c8c166caf9cf1a531a4681c8599: Or I get eaten by a bird.
textByHash.f4809c3f315ca592acdf840cc06fe2d8c9ab8b91: Or it might make some legs longer than others so I wouldn't be able to walk and I'd fall over!
textByHash.f783912d328ee500f820af8cbffec0bc126777eb: You know what? It's great being a spider.
textByHash.f7f6a3f198bbbbe34f9db804d86547d69d41133f: I'd better keep away from that machine!
textByHash.f7fbb554ca446050d85f6e80ade24004e3f1d0cc: I can do special leg-stretching exercises! Make my legs longer naturally! No artificial legs for me!
textByHash.fca865b52717c38e2199a9be0a68b438cbd87e40: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! I made you scared of me! I made you scared of me!
textByHash.ff1a827fd6816f3e9fcc1a60f01fce1834ef8b0b: You're so brave! I bet you're not scared of anything!
